name: Super Fridge Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Total, any combination of sesame seeds, sunflower seeds and chopped nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat honey and peanut butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Quickly add cocoa and stir until well combined.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (seeds, nuts, coconut, and dried fruit) to the mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the mixture into a square greased pan and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until set.
6. Once hardened, cut the fudge into squares.
7. Store in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
